testcase.name: test_rates_usd_includes_sar

failure.message: AssertionError: SAR not in USD rates; sample=['AUD', 'BRL', 'CAD', 'CHF', 'CNY', 'CZK', 'DKK', 'EUR', 'GBP', 'HKD', 'HUF', 'IDR', 'ILS', 'INR', 'ISK', 'JPY', 'KRW', 'MXN', 'MYR', 'NOK', 'NZD', 'PHP', 'PLN', 'RON', 'SEK', 'SGD', 'THB', 'TRY', 'USD', 'ZAR'] assert 'SAR' in {'AUD', 'BRL', 'CAD', 'CHF', 'CNY', 'CZK', ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_foodpro_backend.py:127: in test_rates_usd_includes_sar assert "SAR" in codes, f"SAR not in USD rates; sample={sorted(c for c in codes if c)[:30]}" E AssertionError: SAR not in USD rates; sample=['AUD', 'BRL', 'CAD', 'CHF', 'CNY', 'CZK', 'DKK', 'EUR', 'GBP', 'HKD', 'HUF', 'IDR', 'ILS', 'INR', 'ISK', 'JPY', 'KRW', 'MXN', 'MYR', 'NOK', 'NZD', 'PHP', 'PLN', 'RON', 'SEK', 'SGD', 'THB', 'TRY', 'USD', 'ZAR'] E assert 'SAR' in {'AUD', 'BRL', 'CAD', 'CHF', 'CNY', 'CZK', ...}

testcase.name: test_order_create_and_complete

skipped.message: no products available for demo tenant

testcase.skipped: /app/backend/tests/test_foodpro_backend.py:145: no products available for demo tenant
